ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Type of industry prevalent in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the month */,
  "average_precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which the forecast is made */,
  "economy_growth_rate" REAL /* Economic growth rate for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the forecast is made */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month for which the forecast is made */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the forecast is made */,
  "target" REAL /* Target generation for the month */,
  "pes" REAL /* Actual generation (Pes.) for the month */,
  "opt" REAL /* Optimal usage for the month */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the forecast (Vol., %) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast to which the version belongs */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made in the version (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_versions_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast to which the comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_comments_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_generations" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target generation */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast to which the target generation belongs */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target generation value */,
  "generation_type" TEXT /* Type of generation (e.g., solar, wind, thermal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_generations_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actual_generations" (
  "actual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual generation */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast to which the actual generation belongs */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual generation (Pes.) value */,
  "generation_type" TEXT /* Type of generation (e.g., solar, wind, thermal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actual_generations_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimal_usages" (
  "opt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimal usage */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast to which the optimal usage belongs */,
  "opt_value" REAL /* Optimal usage value */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimal_usages_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatilities" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast to which the volatility belongs */,
  "volatility_value" REAL /* Volatility value */,
  "volatility_type" TEXT /* Type of volatility (e.g., market, weather) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatilities_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "evaluation_text" TEXT /* Text evaluation of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_ratings_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry segment */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region to which the segment belongs */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_segments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region to which the weather data belongs */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month to which the weather data belongs */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the month */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)
